Bash(node -e "require\('dotenv'\).config\(\); console.log\('KEY len:', \(process.env.MERIDIAN_API_KEY||''\).length, 'URL:', process.env.MERIDIAN_BASE_URL\); fetch\(process.env.MERIDIAN_BASE_URL + '/v1/messages', { method: 'POST', headers: { 'x-api-key': process.env.MERIDIAN_API_KEY, 'content-type': 'application/json' }, body: JSON.stringify\({ model: 'claude-haiku-4-5-20251001', max_tokens: 50, messages: [{role:'user',content:'ping'}] }\) }\).then\(r => r.text\(\)\).then\(t => console.log\('status body:', t.slice\(0,500\)\)\).catch\(e => console.log\('err:', e.message\)\);")
